daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you permission to slow down and savor the small things. Your grounded nature is your superpower today—lean into it. Trust the quiet moments.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing you from the sidelines. Whether it's a crush or existing partner, there's an unspoken vibe worth acknowledging. Your authentic self is magnetic rn.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight today. Don't downplay what you're building—people are actually listening. Channel that steady Taurus energy into one solid move instead of scattered efforts.
daily.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity. A chill walk, good food, or just being present matters more than pushing hard. Tune into what actually feels nourishing.

weekly.overview: Your energy this week is all about grounding into what truly matters. The cosmos is gently nudging you toward authenticity—think less performing, more being. Trust your gut, it's been hitting different lately.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a soft invitation to be more vulnerable. Someone might surprise you with how they show up. Let your walls down a little—connection thrives when you do.
weekly.career: This is a solid week for laying foundations, not rushing launches. Your steady vibe is your superpower right now. Focus on quality over quantity, and don't sleep on that project you've been sitting with.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Maybe skip the intensity and lean into what feels nourishing—walks, stretching, whatever brings you peace. Listen to what your nervous system needs.
